targets.expr: sum by (shard) (clamp_min(deriv(redis_stream_coord_shard_stream_length{stream=~"$streamPrefix", group=~"$consumerGroup", shard=~"$shardIndex"}[2m]) - deriv(redis_stream_coord_shard_lag{stream=~"$streamPrefix", group=~"$consumerGroup", shard=~"$shardIndex"}[2m]), 0))

__inputs.name: DS_RSC_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus datasource
__inputs.description: Prometheus datasource scraping the coordinator /actuator/prometheus endpoint.

__inputs.name: DS_RSC_COORDINATOR_API
__inputs.label: Coordinator API datasource
__inputs.description: Infinity datasource configured with the coordinator URL and Basic Auth credentials.

__inputs.name: COORDINATOR_API_URL
__inputs.label: Coordinator API URL
__inputs.description: Base URL reachable from Grafana, for example http://coordinator:8080 or https://api.example.com.
